subcodes.first_line: The clamor hath risen high and the raven hath croaked, and they that are steeped in deceit and hypocrisy have cast aside the Book of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع النعیق و نعب الغراب و المغلون فی حیله و نفاق قد نبذوا کتاب الله عن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment
